params.purpose: baidu ERNIE 의 SSE 각 이벤트 full text 를 raw 로 기록. T1b envelope SQL 설계에 필요한 data fields (message/delta/content/is_end 등) 판독 목적. DevTools EventStream 에서 각 행의 'Data' 컬럼 전체 내용을 copy-paste 하여 raw_events 필드에 JSON array 로 반환.
steps: 9. For FIRST 5 events (rows): select each row → click Data column → copy ENTIRE data value text
10. Return result with raw_events field as array of 5 strings (each = full Data column text for that event)
11. Screenshot EventStream tab showing all rows (step1)
12. Optional: Response tab screenshot to see raw stream (step2)
params.expected_output: raw_events array [first 5 events full JSON text]

notes: cycle 92 T1b design prerequisite. 537 confirmed {status:0, qid:...} shape but full fields unknown. Without data field structure T1b SQL cannot be designed accurately.
